data.title: Implement check-plugin-boundary.sh + allowlist + pre-commit registration
data.description: testing_mode: GREEN | Layer 1 | Depends on 98c0-8c43. Make T1 RED test GREEN. Create: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-boundary.sh (chmod +x) — reads allowlist, uses bash case glob matching, discovers staged additions via git diff --cached --diff-filter=A, fail-open when conf missing. Create: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf — glob patterns covering all post-S1 permitted paths with comment block explaining how to add patterns. Modify: .pre-commit-config.yaml — add plugin-boundary-check entry with 5s timeout via pre-commit-wrapper.sh. Update: .test-index with new source→test mapping. Verification: bash tests/hooks/test-check-plugin-boundary.sh all pass.
